instructions: Review entries, then set include_on_site to true. Run: python scripts/generate_html.py

vulnerabilities.title: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services
vulnerabilities.name: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services Insufficient Granularity of Access Control Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations in accordance with vendor instructions, ensuring compliance with CISA’s BOD 26-04 Prioritizing Security Updates Based on Risk (see URL in Notes) guidance and CISA’s “Forensics Triage Requirements” (see URL in Notes). Follow applicable BOD 26-04 guidance for cloud services or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable. Stakeholders are responsible for evaluating each asset's internet exposure and ensuring adherence to BOD 26-04 patching guidelines.

vulnerabilities.title: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances
vulnerabilities.name: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Server-Side Request Forgery Vulnerability

vulnerabilities.name: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Code Injection Vulnerability
